TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Bunun, story: bnNr-frog_Hanaivaz

S.FORM: mihumisang.
S.TRANSL: 你好。
Nice to see you.

S.FORM: ah muhn ang saikin na pali’uni ah ‘itu mailantangus lahaiban tu palihabasan.
S.TRANSL: 我要再一次講關於祖先的傳說故事
I am going to talk about the legends of the ancestors again.

S.FORM: aiza tu tas tu hanian aiza tacini maz a uvaaz saipuk saia mas asu.
S.TRANSL: 有一天有一個小孩，他養了狗。
One day, there is a child. He kept a dog.

S.FORM: at madamu saia mas tauk tasa tu sisiuh pungadahun saicia ‘isaicia tu pan.
S.TRANSL: 然後呢，他抓起一隻青蛙放進他的瓶子裡。
Then he caught a frog and put it into a bottle.

S.FORM: manaskal saia kaupahanian mashailang mas ‘isaicia tu sisiuh tu dinamu ‘ingadah sia pan cia.
S.TRANSL: 他每天很快樂地玩賞那隻他抓來放在瓶子裡的青蛙。
He was always happy, playing with the frog he caught in the bottle.

S.FORM: aiza tu tas tu labian masabah saia.
S.TRANSL: 有一晚他要睡覺。
One night he was going to sleep.

S.FORM: miliskin saia tu laangati pingadahun saicia ‘isaicia sisiuh sia pan.
S.TRANSL: 他心想反正他已經把青蛙放在瓶子裡面了。
He thought since he had put the frog into the bottle,

S.FORM: at kaupahanian ashailangun at.
S.TRANSL: 然後每天玩賞那隻青蛙。
He would enjoyed the frog every day.

S.FORM: masabah saia hai izaun saicia ‘isaicia asu a.
S.TRANSL: 然後他睡覺時會抱著他的狗。
Then he slept with his dog held in his arms.

S.FORM: mapasabah ‘amin sia ‘isaicia tu sapalan.
S.TRANSL: 他也讓牠睡在他的床上。
He also let [his dog] to sleep in the bed.

S.FORM: undusaan naia daza sapalan at.
S.TRANSL: 兩個一起在床上。
These two were on the bed together.

S.FORM: miliskin uvaaz a tu maz a sisiuh hai pingadahun sia pan.
S.TRANSL: 小孩子認為那個青蛙已經放在瓶子裡面。
The kid thought that the frog was put into the bottle.

S.FORM: at masabah naia.
S.TRANSL: 然後他們睡著了。
Then they fell asleep.

S.FORM: cinkailas in uvaaz a hai macinsuu saia sadu mas isaicia tu pan ingadah sia aih sisiuh tu ingadah cia.
S.TRANSL: 那個小孩突然醒來，立刻往他的瓶子裡看青蛙是否在裡面。
All of a sudden the kid woke up, and immediately he checked if the frog is in the bottle.

S.FORM: cinhuza saia tu aiuh aitu is’uka inaak a dinamu a sisiuh a.
S.TRANSL: 他嚇了一跳，為什麼我所抓的青蛙不見了？
He was shocked, “Why did the frog I caught disappear?”

S.FORM: mindangkaz amin a asu a sadu ai tuza tu uka.
S.TRANSL: 連狗也站起來看，（心想）「哎呀，真的不見了。」
The dog also stood up and looked. ‘Alas, it truly disappeared.’

S.FORM: macinsuu saia kunastu kikilim isaicia tu sinaipuk tu sisiuh ngadah pan.
S.TRANSL: 他馬上下床找他養在瓶子裡的青蛙。
He got out of bed right away and looked for the frog he fostered in the bottle.

S.FORM: sisuhazun saicia amin isaicia sapil a kucu a.
S.TRANSL: 他也把他的拖鞋、鞋子翻遍了。
He also sifted through his slippers and shoes.

S.FORM: tu ka kungadah cia maz a sisiuh a.
S.TRANSL: 會不會青蛙就進到那裡面呢？
Maybe the frog just went inside the shoes?

S.FORM: ai uka.
S.TRANSL: 唉，沒有
Alas, no.

S.FORM: at maz a asu hai mindangaz amin kikilim hai.
S.TRANSL: 然後那隻狗也起來幫忙找（青蛙）。
Then that dog also helped to look for the frog.

S.FORM: nii tu haiap tu kap pungadahun a isaicia bungu a sia pan maz a itu asu a kungadah sia pan cia sasaak kikilim tu isa maz a sisiuh a hai.
S.TRANSL: 狗不知不覺把牠的頭塞進瓶子裡，還一直聞，想找出青蛙到底在哪裡。
The dog got its head stuck in the bottle, smelling around and looking for where the frog was.

S.FORM: ka kungadah sia pan.
S.TRANSL: （那隻狗的頭）就進到瓶子裡了。
The dog got its head stuck inside the bottle.

S.FORM: itu asu bungu hai kungadah pan cia hai nii in mahtu umanun.
S.TRANSL: 狗的頭進到瓶子裡面後，拔不出來了。
The dog put its head inside the bottle and could not get it out.

S.FORM: aiu cinhuza amin a uvaaz a tupa tu ais na mikua maupa cin.
S.TRANSL: 唉唷，小孩也嚇到，說：「啊呀，這樣要怎麼辦？」
The kid was also shocked and said “What am I going to do?”

S.FORM: at miliskin uvaaz a tu nii tu mahtu umanun maz a sia pan a a sia itu asu cia tu bungu cia tu hudhud cia.
S.TRANSL: 然後，那個孩子覺得拿不掉那個卡在狗的脖子上的瓶子。
Then the kid thought it is impossible to remove the bottle stuck to the dog’s neck.

S.FORM: cinliskin saia tu na halhalun ku maz a asu an.
S.TRANSL: 他想他要讓狗掉下去。
He thought he was going to drop the dog.

S.FORM: halhalun at mais muhalhal a saicia asu a hai na panpulpul a pan a.
S.TRANSL: 讓牠掉落，然後，狗掉下去的話，瓶子就會破碎了。
Drop it. Then, once the dog drops, the bottle is going to be broken.

S.FORM: aii tuza tu.
S.TRANSL: 欸，真的！
Wow! Really!

S.FORM: maupa cia saia mahal pakasainun siul.
S.TRANSL: 他就這樣從窗戶把他丟下去。
He dropped the dog from the window like that.

S.FORM: mahalhal hai tuza tu panbulbul a pan hai munapav in itu asu cia bungu a.
S.TRANSL: 丟下去之後，果然瓶子就破了，那個狗的頭出現了！
After dropping it, the bottle really broke, and the dog’s head got out.

S.FORM: ung at istus’a in hai mudaan naia kusia ludun.
S.TRANSL: 然後天亮了，他們去山上。
Then the dawn breaks. They go to the mountains.

S.FORM: kikilim malala’la mas isaicia tu sisiuh cia.
S.TRANSL: 他邊喊邊找他的青蛙。
He yells and looks for his frog.

S.FORM: kikilim tu isa kasu sisiuh.
S.TRANSL: 「青蛙，你在哪裡？」
“where are you, frog?”

S.FORM: via tu macisbai via tu macisbai.
S.TRANSL: 「為什麼跑掉，為什麼要跑掉？」
“Why did you run away, why did you run away?”

S.FORM: amin a asu hai luluang amin kikilim tu ah isa kasu sisiuh.
S.TRANSL: 連那隻狗也是一直汪汪叫著跟著找說：「青蛙你在哪裡？」
The dog is also looking for the frog, barking “Where are you, frog?”

S.FORM: at aupa cisuni mas malala’la naia.
S.TRANSL: 然後他們一直叫。
Then, they keep yelling.

S.FORM: at maz a asu a hai sadu tu aiza maz a malkazingking a ah bahusaz a hai.
S.TRANSL: 然後，狗看到一個掛著的虎頭蜂窩。
Then, the dog sees a suspended hornet hive.

S.FORM: miliskin asu a tu na tunkaudukaudu sia lukis cia kudadaza mavuvuhvuh mas adii a itu bahusaz a lumah a.
S.TRANSL: 狗就想起要攀爬到樹上去，一直搖晃樹上的虎頭蜂窩。
The dog thinks about climbing up to the tree, and keeps shaking the hornet hive.

S.FORM: tu ingadah cia izaun mu maz a inam sinaipuk a sisiuh.
S.TRANSL: 牠想知道青蛙是不是在裡面，想著「是不是你們抓走了我們的青蛙？」
It wonders if the frog is in it, thinks “Did you take our frog away?”

S.FORM: at maz a uvaaz a hai sadu mas ingadah sia dalah tu laak.
S.TRANSL: 然後，那孩子看地上的洞裡面。
Then the kid looks inside the hole on the ground.

S.FORM: malala’la saia sia laak cia tu ingadah cia sisiuh sima kamu ingadah cia antabanun mu inaak sisiuh.
S.TRANSL: 他對著那個洞一直叫：「青蛙，你是否在裡面？你們誰在裡面啊，你們是否偷走了我的青蛙？」
He keeps yelling toward the hole “Frog, are you in there? Who are you in there? Did you steal my frog?”

S.FORM: tinhuza adii uvaaz a tu aiu.
S.TRANSL: 那個孩子嚇到「哎唷！」
That kid is shocked. “Oops!”

S.FORM: mun’apav sia laak hai aiza tauk tasa aluaz.
S.TRANSL: 有一隻老鼠從洞裡出現。
A rat comes out from the cave.

S.FORM: mun’apav a aluaz tu ma bi s matahusngi malala’la ang.
S.TRANSL: 老鼠跑出來說：「是什麼怎麼吵啊？還一直在叫！」
The rat goes out and says “What is so noisy and keeps on yelling!”

S.FORM: cinhuza amin a uvaaz a.
S.TRANSL: 連小孩也嚇到了。
The kid is startled too.

S.FORM: at maz a asu a hai kudadaza saia.
S.TRANSL: 然後，那隻狗他爬上去。
Then that dog goes up.

S.FORM: vuvuhvuhun saicia maz a lukis a.
S.TRANSL: 牠一直搖晃那棟樹。
It keeps shaking the tree.

S.FORM: aiza malkazingking a maz a sia ah bahusaz a lumah a hai.
S.TRANSL: 有一個掛在上面的虎頭蜂窩。
There is a hornet hive hanging.

S.FORM: at maz a uvaaz a hai tungnangadah sia tungnadaza sia lukis.
S.TRANSL: 然後那個孩子躲到裡面，躲到樹上。
Then that kid hides in, on the tree.

S.FORM: aiza isia lukis tu panga tungnadaza saia mikui na sinapun mas bahusaz cia hai.
S.TRANSL: 他躲到樹枝上，萬一被虎頭蜂追他要怎麼辦。
He hides on the branches. What should he do if being chased by hornets.

S.FORM: at maz a asu a hai tunghabin macisbai.
S.TRANSL: 然後那個狗，躲起來，逃跑了。
Then that dog hides away, runs away.

S.FORM: mikui macimananu macisbai a maz a asu hai sinapun mas bahusaz cia.
S.TRANSL: 雖然那個狗用盡全力地跑了，還是被虎頭蜂追趕。
Although the dog runs away with all-out effort, it is chased by the hornets.

S.FORM: at maz a uvaaz a masa tungnangadaza dau sia aih lukis tu siahi at aiza laak ingadah.
S.TRANSL: 然後說是當那個小孩子躲在樹上時，（他發現）樹枝有洞。
Then when the kid hides on the tree, it turns out there is a hole there.

S.FORM: ais kat nii tu haiap tu ka aiza isia laak cia maz a kukuavdaingaz.
S.TRANSL: 原來樹洞裡面有隻大老鷹。
Oops! There turns out to be a huge eagle there.

S.FORM: mun’apav amin a kukuav sadu mas uvaaz cia tu na madamu mas uvaaz cia hai.
S.TRANSL: 老鷹也突然出現，看到那個小孩，要抓那個小孩。
An eagle all of a sudden shows up, that sees the kid and wants to catch him.

S.FORM: cinhuza uvaaz a muhalhal lananastu sia lukis cia tu taklis cia.
S.TRANSL: 那個小孩嚇得摔下來了，掉到地上的樹根。
The kid is shocked, dropping onto the root of the tree.

S.FORM: at tunghabin a uvaaz a tu aiu na mikua bin na tauhtauhun mas adii tu kukuav cia.
S.TRANSL: 然後，那孩子躲起來，（心想：）「哎唷！要怎麼辦呢？我要被那隻老鷹啄了！」
Then the kid hides (and thinks about) “What on earth should I do? I am going to be pecked by the eagle”

S.FORM: madamu saia bungu mapaia tu aiu na mikua na tauhtauhun na bungu a.
S.TRANSL: 他抱著頭，心想：「哎唷要怎麼辦？頭要被噣了。」
He holds his head (and think) “What should I do? My head will be pecked!”

S.FORM: sadu saia tu aiza maupa tu tuundaingaz a.
S.TRANSL: 他好像看到一顆大岩石。
He seems to see a huge rock.

S.FORM: tungnadaza saia tunkaudukaudu sia kudadaza nii tu haiap tu saia hai ka ngabuldaingaz.
S.TRANSL: 他爬上去躲藏，不知道那原來是隻巨大的鹿。
He climbs up and hides there, without knowing it is a huge deer.

S.FORM: ung at tunnadaza saia tu ngabul tu bungu at taldidikus sia itu ngabul tu vaha.
S.TRANSL: 接著，他就爬上鹿的頭，緊緊握住鹿角。
Then he gets onto the deer’s head, seizing antlers tightly.

S.FORM: malala’la saia tu isa kamu sima kamu haiap mas sisiuh ung at sasu tu isaicia asu hai tunghabin ‘amin at.
S.TRANSL: 他大叫著：「你們是誰？你們在哪裡？看過那個青蛙嗎？」接著，他的狗同時也躲起來。
He yells “Who are you? Where are you? Do you know the frog?” Then, at the same time his dog hides too.

S.FORM: kikilim saia malala’la at.
S.TRANSL: 他邊叫邊找（青蛙）。
He yells and looks for (the frog).

S.FORM: cisdadaan a ngabul a.
S.TRANSL: 那個鹿一直跑。
That deer keep running.

S.FORM: halhalun a uvaaz a sia vahlasdaingas tu ‘ung’ung.
S.TRANSL: 孩子被丟在深谷大河的流裡面。
The kid falls into a big river in the valley.

S.FORM: muhalhal ‘amin a asu a.
S.TRANSL: 狗也掉下去了。
The dog also falls.

S.FORM: lanangadah naia sia vahlas tu ‘ung’ungdaingas.
S.TRANSL: 他們掉到山谷的河流裡。
They fall into the river of the valley.

S.FORM: sadu maz a ‘uvaaz a lanangadah naia sia danum cia at.
S.TRANSL: 哎唷，那個小孩看到他們掉到水裡。
Oops! That kid sees they drops into the water.

S.FORM: mahansiap saia miliskin tu ’anvahaun saicia maz a asu a ‘ansainun saicia sia vau.
S.TRANSL: 他靈機一動，思考著把狗扛在他的肩膀。
A bright idea suddenly occurs to him, he thinks about carrying the dog across his shoulders.

S.FORM: at makilavi naia s ning’av ah vahlas cia mutaul.
S.TRANSL: 然後他們順流而下。
Then they go along with the river flow.

S.FORM: sadu saia tu aiza maz a tuhlukisdaingaz.
S.TRANSL: 他們看到有個很大的樹頭。
They see a big trunk existing.

S.FORM: at tungnadadaza naia hai ai tupau saicia maz a asu tu h s pataliva.
S.TRANSL: 他對那隻狗說：「噓，別出聲。」
Then he tells the dog “Shh! Keep quiet!”

S.FORM: ung at tuza tu kudadaza naia sadu kudadaza amin a asu a sia tuhlukis dadaza at.
S.TRANSL: 然後他們上去看。那隻狗也到木頭上去。
Then they go up and see. The dog also gets onto the wood.

S.FORM: minadaza naia uvaaz sadu hai.
S.TRANSL: 他們從上往下看。
They look down from the top.

S.FORM: aii tuza tu usaduan naia aiza tauk dusa itu sisiuh cia sisiuh tu tama mas cina.
S.TRANSL: 哇，他們真的看到，有一對青蛙，那個青蛙的爸爸和媽媽。
Aw! They can truly see a couple of frogs, frog father and frog mother.

S.FORM: tu’i’ia naia masling kahuzas tu’i’ia.
S.TRANSL: 他們一直叫，悅耳的唱歌。
They keep calling and singing wonderfully.

S.FORM: at sadu naia hai avadii saicia maz a dinamu saicia sisiuh a.
S.TRANSL: 他們一直看著，他抓的那隻小青蛙原來在那邊。
They keep looking around, finding out the frog they caught is just there!

S.FORM: isaicia hangsia saia tu uvaaz.
S.TRANSL: 原來是他的孩子。
It turns out to be its son.

S.FORM: at supah isaicia tas’an aluskunan.
S.TRANSL: 他住一起的兄弟姊妹好多！
He has so many siblings living together.

S.FORM: manaskal isain cia kahuhuzas tu’i’ia maz a sia sisiuh a.
S.TRANSL: 那些青蛙在那邊很高興地一直呱呱地唱著歌。
Those frogs are singing happily there.

S.FORM: at tupa saia tu ai tupaun saicia itu sisiuh a tamacina amin tas’an tu kaa tu makuang is’aang laangaci na izaun ku isuu sisiuh uvaaz a na pisialun ku sia n saipuk mapisia naak tu lumah.
S.TRANSL: 然後，他跟青蛙家族說：「別難過，總之我要把小青蛙帶走，把他好好的養在我家。」
Then, he says to the frog family “Don’t be sad! I am going to take your child and raise it well in my home anyway.”

S.FORM: na iska‘uni ku masial tu dadangian.
S.TRANSL: 我會幫他打造個美好的家。
I will make it a good living place.

S.FORM: at maupa cia naia pacinpalavaaz tupa tu ung mihumisang.
S.TRANSL: 然後他們就這樣彼此祝福，互相分開。
Then they leave, they wish one another all good.

S.FORM: kaupa cia.
S.TRANSL: （故事）就到這裡。
That’s it!
